Result

Riviera Moretti is an independent studio based in Vienna, specialising in 
art-directed illustrations for concept-driven architecture, competitions, and pitch entries. Our work explores a painterly and atmospheric approach to visual storytelling — seeking to capture space, lingering light, and narrative beyond literal photorealism. Over the years, our images have contributed to numerous award-winning projects and recognised proposals in both Austrian and international competitions. In a few words, this is what we do here.
RIVIERA MORETTI

AllesWirdGut, André Heller, Berger und Parkkinen, Burtscher Durig, BWM Architekten, bmw retail, Feld72, GernerGerner Plus, Aldo Giannotti, 
Hertl Architekten, KHM Künsthistorisches Museum (Vienna), Juri Troy Architekt, Kabe Architekten, 
Karl und Bremhorst Architekten, Michaela Mair, Mikado, Moosman Architekten, NMPB, 
OFL Architecture, Pichler und Traupmann,

Whenever you feel a connection with our work, or simply appreciate the craft behind it, we warmly invite you to get in touch for your next project and explore how we can work together.

For details about our working process and the booking conditions , please visit our full booking guidelines.
BOOKING

We’re always open to hearing from motivated and talented souls who feel called to express their truth within our evolving practice.

In that case, you already know what to do 
— PDF (max. 10 MB) to job@riviera-moretti.com

The website riviera-moretti.com was designed and developed by Massimiliano Marian as part of his independent creative practice, Moretti Rapid. 

All content published on this website, including texts, images, and graphics, is protected by copyright and may not be reproduced, distributed, or used in any form without prior written permission. The social media icons (Instagram, Facebook, and LinkedIn) displayed on this website are graphic reinterpretations inspired by the original logos.

Riviera Moretti’s contribution is limited to the production and art direction of architectural visualisations and does not imply authorship or ownership of the architectural projects.

All architectural designs presented remain the intellectual property of the respective studios and designers involved.
